{{Quote|Ground support, ace!|Elscol Loro|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 3]]</ref>}}
'''Rebel Rock''' was the codename given to a sniper in the resistance movement on [[Cilpar]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

During the [[Mission to Cilpar|battle]] to liberate the planet from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation, [[Elscol Loro]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] were being pursued in their [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] by a pair of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. As the enemy fighters came dangerously close to hitting them with their laser cannons, Elscol wove the landspeeder between a rock formation, and as they passed through the far side one fighter was destroyed by a shot from a high-powered rifle.
